implementation_summary.summary: CP00-655 is production_ready for the RP21 Admin Console permission matrix workflow-tail descriptor over 40 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, descriptor-only denied/cross-tenant/leak-prevention tests, P06 secondary workflow rows, permission/audit binding rows, Hermes/Claude review boundaries, and CP656 handoff without opening Admin Console runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-655 RP21.P06.M03.S20-RP21.P06.M05.S15 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
